response.justification: The candidate's resume primarily highlights full-stack web and software development experience, with limited evidence of expertise in hardware optimization, AI accelerators, or performance modeling. While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering skills and some experience with low-latency systems, there is no clear alignment with the required deep-learning workload optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator architecture experience. Additionally, the educational background does not meet the minimum qualifications for the Principal level role.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in full-stack development
Experience with low-latency systems and performance optimization in some contexts
Demonstrated ability to work across multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
No evidence of deep-learning workload analysis or GPU architecture expertise
Educational background (Bachelor's in CS) does not meet the required qualifications without sufficient years of experience
